summary: Iteration 30 - Maintenance Mode, Announcements, and Mobile Notice Features Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (12/12). Frontend features verified: Maintenance Tab exists in Admin Settings, Maintenance Mode toggle and message work correctly, Login page shows maintenance page when enabled, Master Admin override (5 clicks on 'soon') reveals login form, MobileNotice component shows on mobile viewports for Trade Monitor, AdminMembers, and AdminLicenses pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Tour modal blocks interaction with Settings page tabs. Users must close tour before accessing Maintenance tab.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PlatformSettings model in server.py was missing maintenance_mode, maintenance_message, and announcements fields - FIXED by adding them
context_for_next_testing_agent: Maintenance mode features fully implemented and tested. Backend API supports maintenance_mode, maintenance_message, and announcements fields. Frontend has Maintenance tab in Admin Settings with toggle and announcements section. Login page shows maintenance page when enabled with hidden Master Admin override (click 'soon' 5 times). MobileNotice component wraps TradeMonitorPage, AdminMembersPage, and AdminLicensesPage.

maintenance_tab.details: Maintenance tab (Maint.) exists in Admin Settings with data-testid='tab-maintenance'. Contains Maintenance Mode toggle, maintenance message textarea, and Announcements section.

maintenance_mode_toggle.details: Toggle exists with data-testid='maintenance-toggle'. When enabled, shows warning banner. Description explains blocking users except Master Admin.

announcements_section.details: Announcements section allows adding announcements with title, message, link_url, link_text, type (info/warning/success), sticky toggle. Active announcements list shows with toggle and delete options.

platform_settings_api.details: GET/PUT /api/settings/platform correctly handles maintenance_mode, maintenance_message, and announcements fields. Backend model updated to include these fields.

login_maintenance_page.details: When maintenance_mode=true, login page shows maintenance page with 'Under Maintenance' title, wrench icon, and maintenance message. Footer copyright displayed.

master_admin_override.details: Clicking 'soon' word 5 times reveals login form. Toast shows 'Master Admin override activated'. data-testid='maintenance-override-trigger' present on 'soon' span.

mobile_notice_component.details: MobileNotice component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/MobileNotice.jsx. Shows 'Better on Desktop' notice on mobile viewports (<768px). Has data-testid='mobile-notice'.

admin_pages_mobile_notice.details: AdminMembersPage (line 415), AdminLicensesPage (line 401), and TradeMonitorPage (line 470) all wrapped with MobileNotice component with showOnMobile={true}.

ui_tests.maintenance_tab: PASS - Tab visible with Wrench icon and 'Maint.' label
ui_tests.maintenance_page: PASS - Shows Under Maintenance title, wrench icon, message with 'soon' word
ui_tests.master_admin_override: PASS - 5 clicks on 'soon' reveals login form with toast notification
ui_tests.mobile_notice: PASS - Shows on Trade Monitor page at mobile viewport
